title: The Reaction Vessel
description: The golem has been tested with 3 ingredients. Identify the animators and determine what potion their mix would produce.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing6: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing8: chest=✗ ears=✗  →  non_reactive
  ing7: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators

Chest reacts to B+L. Ears react to G+L. Animation rule: Large reaction → '+', Small reaction → '−'. So animation ingredients must have B+ AND G+. Cross-reference with the mixing clues to identify those ingredients.
Animation ingredients: ing[2, 7] (nPp, PPP). Mix: B+.
